title: Local-Offload Chassis profiles file
description: Declarative named-profile router config. A profiles file binds named profiles (Fast/Expert/Heavy/Code + custom) to endpoints (local or hosted) with an ordered fallback chain. Extracted from wave-av/wave-dispatch.

endpoints.description: Named endpoints a profile can target. Keys are referenced by profile.endpoint.

profiles.description: Named profiles. Keys are referenced by callers and by profile.fallback entries.

base_url.description: Endpoint root, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:11434 (local) or https://api.anthropic.com (hosted). NEVER hardcode internal WAVE hosts/IPs here — override via env in the spoke.

model.description: Default model tag/id for this endpoint.

api_key_env.description: Name of the env var holding the bearer key (hosted endpoints). null/omitted for keyless local endpoints. The key VALUE is never stored in config.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. HARVEST temp map: Fast 0.2-0.3, Expert 0.45-0.6, Heavy 0.5-1.0, Code 0.15-0.3.

endpoint.description: Name of an entry in the top-level `endpoints` map.

fallback.description: Ordered profile names tried on STRUCTURED failure (timeout / connection error / 5xx / is_bad). Walked deduped + cycle-guarded, terminating at a hosted frontier backstop. Empty for a terminal profile.
